name: surveycto
description: Reads SurveyCTO form IDs, submissions, datasets (including case-management datasets), dataset records, groups, roles, teams, and users, and writes dataset lifecycle mutations, dataset record creation, and user lifecycle mutations, through the SurveyCTO Server API v2.

risk.read: external SurveyCTO API read of form, submission, dataset, group, role, team, and user data
risk.write: external SurveyCTO API mutation (dataset lifecycle, dataset record creation, user lifecycle including password-setting)
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
